summary: Iteration 147: All P0/P1 Bug Fixes VERIFIED. 13/13 backend tests PASS. Frontend UI tests confirm conversational kit assembly and correct pillar categorization.

backend_api_tests.test_travel_kit_asks_questions_first: PASS - Mira asks questions BEFORE assembling kit
backend_api_tests.test_kit_assembly_requires_confirmation: PASS - Kit assembly waits for user confirmation
backend_api_tests.test_kit_assembly_proceeds_after_confirm: PASS - Kit proceeds after 'yes go ahead'

frontend_ui_tests.homepage_loads: PASS - Homepage loads correctly with all navigation
frontend_ui_tests.mira_page_loads: PASS - /mira page loads with chat interface
frontend_ui_tests.travel_kit_conversational_flow: PASS - Mira asks 3 questions before assembling kit

database_verification.service_desk_tickets_subjects: PASS - Tickets show 'Quick Book: Grooming - 2026-02-15' format
database_verification.notifications_categories: PASS - Notifications show 'Mira AI Request: Care' with pillar 'care'

p0_quick_book_service_type.evidence: Backend returns service_type='grooming' in quick-book response, frontend uses data.service_type

p0_conversational_kit_assembly_questions.evidence: UI screenshot shows Mira asking 3 questions: 'Where are you headed?', 'Any specific concerns?', 'What essentials do you already have?'

p0_conversational_kit_assembly_confirmat.evidence: Backend test confirms kit_assembly.stage='gathering_info' initially, moves to 'assembling' only after confirmation

p1_cart_add_to_cart_from_mira.evidence: CartContext.js has event listener for 'addToCart' custom events (lines 172-185)

p0_service_desk_ticket_subjects.evidence: DB shows tickets with subjects like 'Quick Book: Grooming - 2026-02-15' instead of 'No subject'

p0_notification_categories.evidence: DB shows notifications with title 'Mira AI Request: Care' and pillar 'care', not 'Hotel Booking'

critical_code_review_comments: All P0/P1 fixes are correctly implemented and verified
Conversational kit assembly flow works: gathering_info -> confirming -> assembling
Word boundary regex prevents false keyword matches
Service desk tickets and notifications use meaningful subjects/titles
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0/P1 fixes verified: 1) Quick Book returns correct service_type, 2) Conversational kit assembly asks questions before building, 3) Service desk tickets have meaningful subjects, 4) Notifications show correct categories (Care, not Hotel Booking). All tests pass.
